data.fileerrorinfo: please check if the 'EXAM-STUDENT' directory is writeable and has enough space
data.fileerrorinfo2: A local backup could not be created. Please use the manual submission option.

editor.audionotallowed: You don't have the permission to play this file!
editor.backupnotfound: Backup file could not be read
editor.clipboardEmpty: No entries. Copy or cut text first.
editor.exitkiosk: Do not leave safe exam mode without permission.
editor.focusLockReason_ltPort8088: Port 8088 is in use by another service (not LanguageTool)
editor.info: If this process fails unlock and try again!
editor.leftkiosk: You have left the safe exam mode!
editor.noPdfToSend: No PDF available to send. Please try submitting again.
editor.pdfBusyTimeout: PDF creation blocked (timeout). Please wait and try again.
editor.reallyplay: Do you want to play the audiofile?
editor.reloadtext: Would you like to reinitialize the Editor?
editor.replacecontent1: Do you want to replace the content of the editor with the content of
editor.sectionSwitchText: Are you sure you want to switch to the new section?
editor.submissionNetworkFailed: Connection to server failed. Please try again.

forms.reload_text: If you reload the form, all answers you have entered so far will be lost.

math.nospecial: Please enter only letters and numbers without special characters

pdf.warningMessage: less than 2 interactive form fields were found.
pdf.warningMessage2: This indicates that this is a scanned PDF that does not contain active form fields or tables.

student.assessmentFailedMessage:
macOS exam mode (Automatic Assessment) could not be started. The exam will not open.

Local testing: npm run build:apple:local
student.cageExitWarnLinux: You are leaving the secured exam environment. The Linux kiosk session will end (log out). You can only return via the login manager (“Next Exam Kiosk”) — you cannot continue working without signing in again.
student.cageExitWarnWindows: You are quitting Next-Exam in the kiosk session. There is no in-app restart — only signing in again as the exam user. Without that you cannot continue working.
student.cageSetupSuccessHint: Select the session type “Next Exam Kiosk” in the login manager to start the secured environment.
student.cageSetupText: Next-Exam can be set up for Linux clients in SRDP security mode.
student.logoutBiP: Are you sure you want to logout?
student.macRosettaArchText:
This install is the Intel build (x64) and is running on your Apple Silicon Mac only via Rosetta emulation. Performance can be significantly worse.

Please download the arm64 build, replace the app in Applications, and restart Next-Exam.
student.multimonitor: Multiple displays are not allowed for the exam. Please disconnect extra monitors and restart Next-Exam.
student.name: Name
student.noapi: No Teacher API found on the given address
student.outdatedinfo: Please install the same version as the exam server!
student.reconnectedinfo: Reconnected to the exam server. Secure exam mode is already running.
student.registeredinfo:
Successfully registered on server! 

Please wait for the activation of the exam mode by the teacher!
student.screenshotarea: It looks like the full screen was not shared. Please select the entire desktop in the sharing dialog and restart Next-Exam.
student.screenshotpermission: Screen capture permission for Next-Exam was not granted. Please allow screen recording in the system settings and restart Next-Exam.
student.selectinterfaceinfo: Please select a preferred network interface!
student.vmFailed: Virtual machine could not be reached.
student.vmHashMismatchLock: Base image (QCOW2) hash does not match the teacher reference. The VM keeps running; access is locked and the teacher is notified like on focus loss.
student.vmUnverifiedHash: No reference hash from teacher – base image integrity was not verified.
student.vmVerifyingHashHint: This may take a few minutes.
student.localvmDiskMismatch: VM disk does not match the specification (hash/size mismatch). Please re-download or import.
student.localvmMissingDisk: VM disk not found. Please download the VM or import a qcow2 file.
student.localvmStartError: VM cannot be started. Please re-download or import.
student.localvmCompatCheckText: Your system is being checked for compatibility with the exam virtual machine. This may take a few minutes.
student.qemuHypervisorText:
LocalVM on Windows uses QEMU with WHPX. The Windows optional feature “Hypervisor Platform” must be enabled.

PowerShell (admin):
Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName HypervisorPlatform -All

Reboot may be required.
student.qemuMissingText: LocalVM needs a system install of qemu. They were not found on this computer.
student.qemuVirtDisabledText:
Hardware virtualization (Intel VT-x / AMD-V) is disabled on this computer. LocalVM requires this CPU feature.

Please enable "Virtualization Technology" (Intel VT-x) or "SVM Mode" (AMD) in your BIOS/UEFI and restart the computer.
student.versionNewer: Your version of Next-Exam is newer than the teacher's!
student.versionOld: Your version of Next-Exam is too old. Please download a current version!
student.networkError: There is a problem with the network, firewall rules, or network permissions! Please resolve this issue and restart Next-Exam!
student.winKioskSessionInfoText: You are in the locked-down exam environment (Windows Assigned Access). Press Alt+Tab to switch between Next-Exam and other allowed applications.
student.winKioskSetupEditionHint: Multi-App Assigned Access requires Windows Pro, Education or Enterprise. This kiosk variant is not available on Windows Home.
student.winKioskSetupSuccessHint: Sign out and pick user “next-exam-kiosk” on the login screen (no password required) to start the locked-down exam environment.
student.winKioskSetupText: Next-Exam can be set up as a locked-down kiosk on this Windows PC (separate user, USB drives blocked, profile wiped after each exam).
student.wlanNopermissionsText: Windows requires location permissions to retrieve WLAN information. Please enable location services in Privacy & Security settings.

submissionSign.askText: A signature password lets you verify later that your submission was not altered.
